The background features a lush green Christmas tree adorned with red and gold baubles, warm string lights, and red plaid ribbon. To her left, a portion of a sofa is visible with a red and white patterned throw pillow featuring reindeer and snowflakes. The lighting is warm and festive, creating a cozy holiday atmosphere. The girl is dressed in a light pink plaid skirt, and she looks directly at the camera with a gentle, sweet expression. The overall scene is a

A young boy is sitting cross-legged on a light wooden floor in front of a decorated Christmas tree, wearing the sweatshirt. He is also wearing a red and green elf hat with a small gold bell. The Christmas tree behind him is adorned with red and gold ornaments and small red ribbons. To the right of the boy, there are wrapped gift boxes with red ribbons and festive patterns. The background is a plain light gray wall, and the lighting is soft and natural, highlighting the boy and the holiday scene. The overall composition is warm and festive, with the boy positioned slightly off-center, looking directly at the camera with a gentle smile.

A flat-lay product shot of the sweatshirt centered on a smooth, neutral gray surface. The sweatshirt is surrounded by various Christmas-themed decorative items arranged in a balanced, scattered composition around its edges. To the top left, there are several shiny red baubles and a white ornament with red patterns and a red pom-pom. Nearby, two striped candy canes lie diagonally. To the top right, a red and white Santa hat is partially visible, along with a small white snowman figurine wearing a green hat and red scarf. variation_files.prompt: A split-screen composition featuring a close-up of a smiling person on the right side, showcasing bright, white teeth and a hand gently touching the cheek, set against a plain light background. On the left side, the teeth whitening powder is displayed in a jar with a black lid, positioned on a reflective surface. The background behind the product is a solid green panel with subtle vertical stripes. To the right of the product, there is a graphic of a split coconut with green leaves and small white flowers. Above the product, a small cluster of green mint leaves is visible. The overall lighting is bright and even, highlighting the product and the person’s smile.

A split-screen layout featuring a close-up of a smiling woman on the right side, pointing with her index finger toward her bright, white teeth. On the left side, a jar of the teeth whitening powder is displayed, positioned upright and slightly angled to show its front. The background is plain white. Below the product and the woman, there is a solid green horizontal panel with vertical stripes. The overall lighting is bright and even, highlighting the woman’s skin and the product. The woman has long, straight brown hair and is looking directly at the camera with a cheerful expression. The product is placed on a reflective surface, creating a subtle mirror-like reflection beneath it.
